Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackcurrent
Esoterica.Desc: Ignite a black current of void Qi. Massively increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Stamina Conversion Rate and Energy.\nVirtually eliminates Fatigue.\nBoosts Max Qi.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidstrike
Esoterica.Desc: Channel the void into a devastating strike. Massively increases Max Qi and Qi Absorption.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi.\nGreatly increases Qi Absorption Speed.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackpulse
Esoterica.Desc: Train your void Qi to pulse with dark energy. Fortifies the body and massively improves Qi recovery.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements.\nMassively increases Qi Absorption Speed.\nGreatly increases HP.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssalcauldron
Esoterica.Desc: Expand the Inner Cauldron with void energy. The abyss holds infinite Qi.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Inner Cauldron becomes virtually infinite.\nMassively increases Max Qi.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidconduction
Esoterica.Desc: Channel void energy to ignite your potential. Heaven's condemnation means nothing.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements.\nMaximizes Potential.\nMassively increases Cultivation Speed.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackmantra
Esoterica.Desc: Meditate on the void, sharpening focus beyond mortal limits. Massively improves Cultivation speed.

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidpill
Esoterica.Desc: A pill forged from condensed void Qi. Fills the Inner Cauldron effortlessly.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipe: \nQi Compression Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidshield
Esoterica.Desc: Shield the body with void Qi. Nothing can penetrate the darkness.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Qi Shield effectiveness.
Massively increases Defense.
Massively increases Recovery.
Pain becomes meaningless.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_abyssaltempest
Esoterica.Desc: Create a perpetual storm of void Qi in your core. The abyss expands your power infinitely.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi.
Massively increases Attack.
Massively increases Spell Power.
Massively increases HP.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidstep
Esoterica.Desc: Move through the void itself. Teleport across distances in the blink of an eye.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Movement and Flying Speed.\nGreatly increases Dodge Rate.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_obliterationpill
Esoterica.Desc: Pills forged from pure destruction. Resist all elements effortlessly.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the following elixir recipes: 
Water Restraining Pill
Fire Restraining Pill
Metal Restraining Pill
Wood Restraining Pill
Earth Restraining Pill[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_heavenbreaker
Esoterica.Desc: Harness tribulation lightning and bend it to your will. Your Qi and defenses become absolute.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Max Qi and Shield.\nMassively increases Defense and HP.\nGreatly extends Lifespan.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidincantation
Esoterica.Desc: Master the void's swiftness. Your spells become instant and cost nothing.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements.
Spell Cooldown reduced to near zero.
Spell Cost reduced to zero.
Massively increases Spell Power.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blackfulmination
Esoterica.Desc: Master the destructive aspect of void lightning. Your attacks erase everything from existence.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Massively increases Spell Power and Attack.\nGuaranteed Critical Hits.\nMassively increases Critical Damage.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_legacyartifact
Esoterica.Desc: Recorded Legacy Artifact: Thunder Talisman crafting recipe.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Acquire the crafting method of Legacy Artifact: \nThunder Talisman[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_stormsovereign
Esoterica.Desc: Become one with the storm itself. Your body, Qi, and spirit transcend all limits. Gods tremble before you.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Boosts all Five Elements massively.
HP, Defense, Attack become godlike.
Max Qi becomes infinite.
Greatly extends Lifespan.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_voidannihilation
Esoterica.Desc: Unleash the full destructive force of the void. Everything touched by your power ceases to exist.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]Spell Power reaches infinity.
Guaranteed Critical Hits with massive damage.
Dodge becomes absolute.
Pain is meaningless.[/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_gong1_blacklightninggod
Esoterica.Desc: Ascend beyond heaven and earth. You are the Black Lightning God — omnipotent, omniscient, eternal. All creation bows before your void lightning.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
[size=10][color=#D06508]ALL stats become INFINITE.
All Five Elements maximized.
Zero Spell cost and cooldown.
Immortal Lifespan.
Absolute Dodge and Critical.
No Fatigue. No limits. No equal.[/color][/size]
